title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE OREGON - 211info
text: ROSEWOOD FAMILY HEALTH AT LENTS GENERAL MEDICAL CARE OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides acute and chronic disease care, immunizations, sports physicals, prenatal care, family planning, reproductive health, and health education. 9047 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 7:30am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 8:30am-6pm (503) 772-8751 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 772-8751 Main phone Main phone (503) 772-8751 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees also available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Contraception General Medical Care Pap Tests Pediatrics Prenatal Care Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROSEWOOD FAMILY HEALTH AT LENTS
